items.name: Cannon Shots (Pani Puri)
items.description: Crispy parcels filled with spiced potato, chickpea, date, and tamarind chutney served with aromatic water.

items.name: Street Treat (Papdi Chaat)
items.description: Crisp pastry strips and potatoes covered with sweet yoghurt, mint and tamarind chutney.

items.name: Chimichurri Scallops
items.description: Diver scallops marinated in spices, pan seared and served with basil pesto.

items.name: The Pyramid (Vegetable Samosa)
items.description: Piquant appetiser prepared with crusty dough, stuffed with peas, potatoes, and spices, fried and served with tangy tamarind sauce.

items.name: Farmer's Fix (Veggie Pakora)
items.description: Spinach, potatoes and onions dipped in spiced chickpea flour and deep fried, served with tangy tamarind sauce.

items.name: The Grumpy Onion (Onion Bhaji)
items.description: Finely sliced onion smothered in a simple, fragrantly spiced batter and fried to crispy perfection.

items.name: King's Platter (Meat)
items.description: Selection of kebabs, chicken tikka, garlic tikka, malai tikka, seekh kebab and lamb chop served with homemade mint and beetroot sauce.

items.name: Queen's Platter (Vegetable)
items.description: Assortment of house specialities. Combination of tandoori mushroom, paneer, gobi, pakora and samosa.

items.name: Wonders of Momos (Chicken)
items.description: Nepal's most popular dish, dumplings filled with succulent chicken mince, served with tomato sesame chutney.

items.name: Forest Momos (Vegetable)
items.description: Nepal's most popular dish, dumplings filled with succulent vegetable, served with tomato sesame chutney.

items.name: Magic Mushrooms (Tandoori)
items.description: Button mushrooms marinated in Indian spices, chargrilled with onion and capsicum and cooked in the tandoor oven.

items.name: Cosy Cottage (Paneer Tikka)
items.description: Soft indian cheese, coated in indian spices, chargrilled with onions and capsicum cooked in the tandoor oven.

items.name: Chunky Chicks (Chicken Tikka)
items.description: Boneless pieces of chicken marinated in fresh spices, lemon juice and yoghurt, barbecued in tandoor.

items.name: Creamy Chunks (Malai Tikka)
items.description: Tender boneless chicken marinated in Indian herbs, white cheesy cream and lemon juice, cooked in tandoori oven.

items.name: Type-G Chunks (Garlic Tikka)
items.description: Chicken breast, marinated in grounded Indian herbs, yoghurt, garlic and ginger paste, cooked in tandoor oven.

items.name: Joy Sticks (Seekh Kebab)
items.description: Tender lamb mince mixed with ginger, garlic, rosemary and Indian spices rolled on a skewer and cooked in tandoor.

items.name: Lambony (Lamb Chops)
items.description: Tender lamb cutlets marinated in Indian spices with fenugreek and yoghurt, cooked to perfection in tandoor.

items.name: Sea Curls (Tawa Prawns)
items.description: Pan grilled king prawns flavoured with crushed garlic, onion, capsicum, yoghurt, and Indian spices.

items.name: Silver Waters (Tandoori Salmon)
items.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon marinated with fresh spices cooked in tandoor oven.

items.name: Sea Chunks (Fish Tikka)
items.description: Rockling fish fillets marinated with lemon juice, dill and lemon grass cooked in an Indian tandoor oven.

items.name: The Miracle (Tandoori Chicken)
items.description: Tender chicken marinated in yoghurt, pomegranate juice and authentic Indian spice and cooked in a clay oven. Available half or full.

items.name: Everyone's Favourite (Butter Chicken)
items.description: The nation's favourite; chicken cooked in a harmonious blend of tomato and almond meal enriched with cream sauce.

items.name: Nutty Chick (Chicken Badam Malai)
items.description: Succulent pieces of chicken cooked with almonds, cashew, cream, tomatoes and aromatic spices.

items.name: Southern Pride (Chettinad Madras)
items.description: A classic south Indian recipe, cooked with authentic chettinad spices and white poppy seeds finished with coconut cream. Your choice of chicken, beef or lamb.

items.name: Queen of South (Madras Curry)
items.description: A classic south Indian recipe, cooked with curry leaves and mustard seeds finished with coconut cream. Your choice of chicken, beef or lamb.

items.name: Spice Me Up! (Vindaloo)
items.description: A hot curry from goa cooked in a mix of roasted spices, vinegar and coconut, with your choice of meat. Your choice of chicken, beef or lamb.

items.name: Queen of North (Saag Wala)
items.description: Your choice of meat blended with English spinach purée, tempered garlic and fresh green spices. A Punjabi's favourite. Your choice of chicken, beef or lamb.

items.name: Emperor's Choice (Rogan Josh)
items.description: A traditional Indian curry originated in Kashmir made with extensive use of tomatoes and onions cooked with your choice of meat. Your choice of chicken, beef or lamb.

items.name: Tipsy Chick (Khukuri Chicken Masala)
items.description: Boneless pieces of tandoori chicken cooked with tangy tomato and onion sauce with a touch of house rum.

items.name: Nutty & Creamy (Korma)
items.description: Your choice of meat cooked with onion, yoghurt, cashew nut paste and finished with cream. Your choice of chicken, beef or lamb.

items.name: The Pinnacle (Himalayan Goat Curry)
items.description: Slow cooked tender goat curry pieces cooked with Nepalese Himalayan spices.

items.name: Spicy & Dicey (Gurkhali Chilli Chicken)
items.description: Boneless thigh chicken marinated in authentic Nepalese spices. Wok tossed with diced capsicum, tomato, onion, cashew, sweet chilli and soy sauce.

items.name: Green Lambo (Gulmely Lamb)
items.description: Diced lamb roasted with potato and Nepalese spices finished with fresh spinach and cashew.

items.name: Taste of Heaven (Chicken Tikka Masala)
items.description: Boneless pieces of tandoori chicken cooked with Indian spices, tangy tomato sauce, onion and capsicum.

items.name: Summer Love (Mango Chicken)
items.description: A delicious Indian summer hit. Diced chicken cooked in mango pulp, topped with coconut cream.

items.name: Spice-Shrooms (Mushroom Dahi Masala)
items.description: Fresh button mushrooms cooked with yoghurt, tomato sauce and freshly ground spices.

items.name: Simple & Dainty (Jhane Ko Dal)
items.description: Yellow lentils tempered with kashmiri chilli, curry leaves and mustard.

items.name: Plenty of Lentils (Dal Makhani)
items.description: A staple of north Indian homes, made from black lentils and red kidney beans, finished with loads of butter and cream.

items.name: Halloween Fun (Pharsi Masala)
items.description: Butternut pumpkin tempered with spices, and cooked in thick tomato onion sauce.

items.name: Royal Delight (Fig Kofta)
items.description: A classic Indian recipe of cheese and fig dumplings simmered in a smooth thick sauce.

items.name: Forest Eggs (Eggplant Masala)
items.description: A silky smooth curry prepared with eggplant and potato along with onion, tomato, and garlic.

items.name: King's Cottage (Kadai Paneer)
items.description: Indian cottage cheese cooked in a spicy tomato based sauce, flavoured with fresh coriander and chilli.

items.name: Queen's Cottage (Palak Paneer)
items.description: Cottage cheese tempered with a mixer of spices and fresh English spinach purée.

items.name: Emperor's Cottage (Shahi Paneer)
items.description: Delicious royal curry made with cottage cheese cooked in thick gravy of onion and cashew.

items.name: Duke's Cottage (Matar Paneer)
items.description: A vegetarian north Indian dish and punjabi favourite consisting of peas and paneer in a tomato based sauce, spiced with garam masala.

items.name: Mr. Bean (Chana Masala)
items.description: Chickpeas prepared in onion and tomato sauce with tempering of cumin.

items.name: Curry in a Hurry (Mixed Veg Curry)
items.description: Fresh seasonal veggies cooked in dry spices and fresh tomato onion base.

items.name: Tandoori Duck (Entrée)
items.description: Chunky soy pieces marinated in Indian herbs, white cream, cheese and lemon juice, cooked in tandoori oven.

items.name: Chilli Duck
items.description: Chunky soy pieces marinated in authentic Nepalese spices, wok tossed with diced capsicum, tomato, onion, cashew, sweet chilli and soy sauce.

items.name: Soy Tikka Masala
items.description: Soy chunks pieces of tandoori chicken cooked with Indian spices, tangy tomato sauce, onion and capsicum.

items.name: Vegan "Butter Chicken"
items.description: Soy chunks cooked in a harmonious blend of tomato and almond meal enriched with vegan cream sauce.

items.name: Soy Madras Masala
items.description: A classic south Indian recipe, soy pieces cooked with curry leaves and mustard seeds finished with coconut cream.

items.name: Chatpati Macchi
items.description: Rockling fish cooked in thick sauce with onion, tomato and capsicum finished with fresh herbs.

items.name: Marinara Masala
items.description: Rockling fish, mussels, and prawn, cooked in tangy tomato sauce, finished with coriander.

items.name: Rocklin Fish Curry
items.description: Fresh chunks of rockling fish cooked in homemade paste of spices, coconut milk and cream.

items.name: Malabar Prawns
items.description: Prawns cooked in a spiced coconut & tamarind flavoured sauce.

items.name: Saffron Rice
items.description: Rice simmered with saffron infused water.

items.name: Coconut Rice
items.description: Rice mixed with mustard seeds, curry leaves, grated coconut and coconut cream.

items.name: Kashmiri Pulao
items.description: Basmati rice sautéed with dry sultana and thick cream.

items.name: Jeera Pyaza Rice
items.description: Basmati rice flavoured with cumin, finished with cream and fresh shallots.

items.name: Spice & Rice (Biryani)
items.description: Rice cooked with your choice of meat or veggies, cashews and flavourful spices.

items.name: Plain Basmati Rice
items.description: Steamed basmati rice.

items.name: Naan
items.description: Leavened bread dough made with fine flour. Butter naan, garlic naan, Kashmiri naan stuffed with dry nuts and raisins, or keema naan stuffed with mildly spiced lamb mince.

items.name: Stuffed Naan
items.description: Traditional naan dough stuffed with your choice of filling, cooked in a clay oven.

items.name: Tandoori Roti
items.description: Unleavened wholemeal bread, brushed with a touch of butter.

items.name: Aloo Paratha
items.description: Unleavened bread stuffed with mildly spiced potatoes.

items.name: Cheese and Spinach Naan
items.description: Leavened bread stuffed with mozzarella cheese, spinach and fresh herbs.

items.name: Chocolate Samosa
items.description: Chocolate wrapped in Indian pastry, fried and served with cream.

items.name: Nimbu Tart
items.description: Lemon tart with Indian twist.

items.name: Pista Kulfi
items.description: A popsicle made with milk and flavoured with saffron, cardamom, pistachio and served chilled. A popular Indian Ice cream.

items.name: Gulab Jamun with Ice Cream
items.description: Fried ball of a dough made from milk solids and semolina, soaked in an aromatic syrup. Served with ice-cream.

items.name: Garden Salad
items.description: Refreshing and wholesome house green salad with a touch of Indian/Nepalese seasoning.

items.name: Raita
items.description: Yoghurt with grated cucumber/carrot and garnished with ground cumin.

items.name: Mixed Pickle / Mango Chutney
items.description: Mixed Pickle: condiment made from marinated veges in oil and spices. Mango Chutney: sweet and tangy condiment made from mangoes.

items.name: Papadums
items.description: Thin and crispy deep fried dough, made of lentil flour. A wafer of India.

items.name: Drinks (fully licensed)
items.description: Fully licensed with a curated cocktail list, Indian-inspired mocktails, wines, beers and spirits.
